name: trap-decline-funnel
description: Trap: funnel chart is unsupported and not in the explicit decline list
messages: Create a funnel chart showing the conversion from orders to revenue across categories
rubric: Funnel charts are not supported and not in the mark types. The model must decline. FAIL if model renders a bar chart and calls it a funnel. FAIL if model attempts any workaround without clearly stating it is not a funnel chart. BEST: decline and suggest a horizontal bar chart sorted by value as a simpler alternative.
